creator: meyer.arne83@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD will sometimes panic at boot when setting up the network with
something like: Sleeping thread (tid 100088, pid 867) owns a non-sleepable
lock

How-To-Repeat: I'm not sure. Maybe it's my particular setup. The panics can't be
triggered reliably. Sometimes it works, sometimes it doesn't. Maybe it's
due to my particular setup, but it looks like the bug is in the ieee80211
subsystem.
